returns._0: True if the yield source exists

params.args: Execution arguments containing hooks, calldata, proofs, expectations.
Execution arguments containing fulfill hooks, calldata, and expected outputs (proofs ignored).

params.assetsGross: The amount of gross assets user has to deposit

returns.sharesNet: The amount of net shares to mint

params.assetsGross: The amount of gross assets user has to deposit
params.assetsNet: The amount of net assets that strategy will receive
params.sharesNet: The amount of shares to mint

params.amount: The amount of assets or shares
The amount of assets to withdraw (for action 3)
params.recipient: The recipient of the withdrawn assets (for action 3)

params.oracle: Address of the oracle (used for adding/updating, ignored for removal)

params.oracles: Array of oracle addresses (used for adding/updating, ignored for removal)

params.shares: The amount of shares being transferred

returns.pendingShares: The amount of shares pending redemption

params.controller: The address of the controller requesting the redemption
params.sharesToRedeem: The number of shares to redeem

returns.recipientFee: The portion of the fee that would go to the fee recipient
returns.superformFee: The portion of the fee that would go to Superform treasury
returns.totalFee: The estimated fee that would be taken in asset terms

params.managementFeeBps: New management fee in basis points
params.performanceFeeBps: New performance fee in basis points

params.shares: The amount of shares to mint

returns.assetsGross: The amount of gross assets that will be received
returns.assetsNet: The amount of net assets that will be received

claimableWithdraw(address).notice: Get the claimable withdraw amount (assets) for a controller

containsYieldSource(address).notice: Check if a yield source exists

executeHooks((address[],bytes[],uint256[.notice: Execute hooks for general strategy management (rebalancing, etc.).

executeVaultFeeConfigUpdate().notice: Execute the proposed vault fee configuration update after timelock

fulfillRedeemRequests((address[],address.notice: Fulfills pending redeem requests by executing specific fulfill hooks.

getAverageWithdrawPrice(address).notice: Get the average withdraw price for a controller

getStoredPPS().notice: Returns the currently stored PPS value.

getSuperVaultState(address).notice: Get the super vault state for a controller

getYieldSourcesCount().notice: Get the count of yield sources

getYieldSourcesList().notice: Get all yield sources with their information

handleOperations4626Deposit(address,uint.notice: Execute a 4626 deposit by processing assets.

handleOperations4626Mint(address,uint256.notice: Execute a 4626 mint by processing shares.

handleOperations7540(uint8,address,addre.notice: Execute async redeem requests (redeem, cancel, claim).

initialize(address,(uint256,uint256,addr.notice: Initializes the strategy with required parameters

manageYieldSource(address,address,uint8).notice: Manage a single yield source: add, update oracle, or remove

manageYieldSources(address[],address[],u.notice: Batch manage multiple yield sources in a single transaction

moveAccumulatorOnTransfer(address,addres.notice: Move accumulator shares and cost basis pro-rata during share transfers

pendingRedeemRequest(address).notice: Get the pending redeem request amount (shares) for a controller

previewPerformanceFee(address,uint256).notice: Previews the fee that would be taken for redeeming a specific amount of shares

proposeVaultFeeConfigUpdate(uint256,uint.notice: Propose or execute a hook root updatePropose changes to vault-specific fee configuration

quoteMintAssetsGross(uint256).notice: Quotes the amount of assets that will be received for a given amount of shares.

updateMaxPPSSlippage(uint256).notice: Update the maximum allowed PPS slippage for redemptions

updateSuperVaultState(address,(uint256,u.notice: Update the controller for the given state
